overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, atmospheric forest at night. The character follows a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth, with moody blue-green lighting creating an immersive wilderness atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with dense pine coverage

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path, viewed from behind with his silver hair and armor visible

entered.detail: Dense tree canopy blocking most of the night sky, creating a dark enclosed atmosphere
Narrow winding dirt trail through the forest with visible grass edges
Tall pine trees forming the left boundary of the forest path
Tall pine trees forming the right boundary of the forest path
Grass and low bushes growing between the path and the tree line
Grass and low bushes growing between the path and the tree line

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks steadily along a narrow dirt path through a dark forest at night. Tall pine trees line both sides of the trail in the distance, with dense undergrowth visible at the edges. The forest canopy overhead blocks most light, creating a moody blue-green atmosphere with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest section with large oak trees

events.description: character turns left to follow the winding forest path around a large tree

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigates a left curve in the path, moving closer to the trees on the left side

entered.detail: Massive oak tree trunk with rough bark that the character passes closely on the left

segments.scene_description: The path curves left through denser forest, bringing Geralt close to a massive oak tree on the left. The tree lines on both sides appear closer as the trail narrows, with the canopy continuing to block the night sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: path curves gently to the right as the character continues deeper into the forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the winding trail, navigating through deeper sections of the forest

entered.detail: Large boulder covered in green moss beside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues winding through the deep forest, with Geralt passing a mossy rock formation on the left. The path curves gently to the right as the tree lines shift back to the distance, maintaining the dark, immersive wilderness atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, atmospheric forest as a narrow dirt path winds deeper into a dense wilderness. It begins with Geralt walking steadily along a trail lined by distant pine trees under a heavy canopy that casts a moody blue-green light. As the path curves left, the forest closes in, bringing the camera close to a massive oak tree while the surrounding tree lines tighten around the narrowing trail. The scene then shifts as the path winds further, passing a mossy rock formation on the left before curving gently to the right. Finally, the terrain opens slightly as the tree lines recede back into the distance, maintaining the immersive, shadowed atmosphere of the deep woods.
